entries.name: KoeNote
entries.notes: KoeNote application source code is licensed under the Apache License 2.0. Third-party libraries, runtime tools, and models are governed by their respective licenses.

entries.name: Microsoft.Data.Sqlite
entries.notes: Verify package license metadata during release packaging.

entries.name: FFmpeg runtime
entries.expectedPath: tools/ffmpeg.exe; tools/avcodec-*.dll; tools/avdevice-*.dll; tools/avfilter-*.dll; tools/avformat-*.dll; tools/avutil-*.dll; tools/swresample-*.dll; tools/swscale-*.dll
entries.notes: Used for local audio normalization before ASR. Shared FFmpeg builds require the companion DLLs to be deployed next to ffmpeg.exe.

entries.name: Python 3.12 x64 runtime
entries.notes: Bundled so ASR and speaker diarization setup do not depend on host Python. Python packages such as faster-whisper, diarize, torch, and torchaudio are downloaded during first-run setup and are governed by their respective package licenses.

entries.name: llama.cpp CPU x64 runtime
entries.notes: Bundled so the Review stage can run after a Review GGUF model is installed. KoeNote uses the CPU x64 binary to avoid adding a GPU driver dependency.

entries.name: llama.cpp CUDA bridge for Review
entries.notes: Bundled in the GPU-ready MSI as KoeNote-specific Review GPU runtime glue. NVIDIA redistributable DLLs such as cuBLAS and CUDA runtime are not bundled and are resolved by Setup Wizard.

entries.name: Crisp ASR / whisper GPU runtime files
entries.license: Verify upstream runtime licenses during release packaging
entries.notes: Bundled in the GPU-ready MSI so ASR GPU setup only needs NVIDIA redistributable CUDA/cuDNN DLLs at setup time.

entries.name: NVIDIA CUDA/cuDNN redistributable DLLs
entries.license: NVIDIA CUDA Toolkit / cuDNN license terms
entries.expectedPath: Downloaded or reused by Setup Wizard; not bundled in the MSI
entries.notes: Setup Wizard resolves URLs, sizes, and SHA256 hashes from NVIDIA redistributable manifests, then installs required DLLs such as cudart64_12.dll, cublas64_12.dll, cublasLt64_12.dll, and cudnn*.dll.

entries.name: Prism llama.cpp CPU x64 runtime
entries.notes: Optional runtime for hidden/experimental Ternary Bonsai Q2_0 models. It is not required for default release builds.
